tagline: Your Backyard's Best Friend — Healthy Pool People

hero.headline:
40 Years Keeping Pools Pristine Across
the Inland Empire
hero.subheadline: Since 1984, Redlands Pool & Spa Center has been the one-stop destination for weekly maintenance, expert repairs, pool construction, and everything in between. With 13+ certified technicians and a fully stocked retail showroom, we handle it all so you can just enjoy the water.

services.label: Full-Service Pool & Spa Care
services.headline: One Destination for Every<br class="hidden md:block"> Pool & Spa Need
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to complete pool construction, our licensed team and retail showroom have everything your backyard needs under one roof.

cards.title: Weekly Pool & Spa Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive Poolrite weekly service that keeps your pool and spa crystal clear year-round. Chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, and equipment checks — all handled by our skilled team.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation. Our licensed technicians get it fixed fast — most repairs completed same-visit.

cards.title: Pool Construction & Remodeling
cards.description: Full backyard design, new pool builds, and renovations with smart technology integration. Replastering, tile work, and complete remodels backed by our C-53 contractor license.

cards.title: Saltwater Conversions
cards.description: Professional conversion from traditional chlorine to modern saltwater systems. Softer water that is gentler on skin and eyes while cutting your ongoing chemical costs.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Sales
cards.description: Authorized HotSpring Spas dealer with a showroom featuring the latest models. Full delivery, installation, and ongoing maintenance support for every spa we sell.

cards.title: Retail Store & Water Testing
cards.description: Walk-in retail showroom stocked with chemicals, supplies, and accessories. Plus free BioGuard computerized water testing with specific recommendations for your pool.

steps.title: Call or Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Reach us by phone or stop by our Redlands retail store. We'll discuss your pool needs and schedule a convenient time to evaluate your backyard.

steps.title: We Assess & Recommend
steps.description: Our certified technicians inspect your pool and equipment, test your water chemistry, and provide an honest, no-pressure recommendation tailored to your situation.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy the Water
steps.description: Whether it is weekly maintenance, a repair, or a full remodel — we handle every detail so your only job is enjoying the pool with family and friends.

about.label: Why the Inland Empire Trusts Us
about.headline: Not Just a Pool Company — Your Backyard's Best Friend Since 1984
about.description: Redlands Pool & Spa Center has been the Inland Empire's go-to pool and spa destination for over four decades. As a Poolwerx franchise, we combine the expertise of a locally owned business with the backing of a global pool care brand. Our 13+ industry-certified technicians bring 50+ years of combined experience to every job — from routine maintenance to complex construction projects. We hold a California C-53 contractor license and treat every backyard like our own.

features.title: 13+ Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician on our team is industry-certified with years of hands-on experience, ensuring expert care for your pool and spa.

features.title: Full-Service Under One Roof
features.description: Maintenance, repairs, construction, retail supplies, hot tubs, and water testing — everything you need in one trusted destination.

features.title: Poolwerx-Backed Quality
features.description: Locally owned with the training, technology, and standards of a global pool care franchise. The best of both worlds for your backyard.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Honest Recommendations.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. We provide customized quotes based on your pool size and needs — no cookie-cutter packages, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Healthy Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back to make it right at no additional charge. We have built our reputation on trust and integrity for over 40 years, and we stand behind every job our team performs.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are added to our service route within one week. Call us or stop by the showroom and we will get you scheduled right away.

faqs.question: Do you offer free water testing?
faqs.answer: Yes! Bring a water sample to our Redlands retail store anytime. Our BioGuard computerized testing system analyzes your water and provides specific chemical recommendations — completely free.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We hold a California C-53 swimming pool contractor license, and our team of 13+ technicians are industry-certified with over 50 years of combined experience.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Redlands, Loma Linda, Yucaipa, Highland, Grand Terrace, Beaumont, Bryn Mawr, and surrounding Inland Empire communities. Call us to confirm we cover your area.

faqs.question: Can you help me choose a hot tub or spa?
faqs.answer: Yes! We are an authorized HotSpring Spas dealer. Visit our showroom to see the latest models, and our team will help you find the perfect fit for your space and budget, including delivery and installation.

testimonials.name: A.S.
testimonials.text: Been coming here for 25 years. You can't beat their experience, service, value and integrity! The whole team is knowledgeable and always willing to help.

testimonials.name: J.P.
testimonials.text: Honest and dependable service over 10 years. Never a hard sell. They answer their phone. Talented crew that truly knows pools inside and out.

testimonials.name: T.O.
testimonials.text: They tested my pool water for free and gave me specific recommendations. My pool is now looking awesome — crystal clear and perfectly balanced.

contact.headline:
Ready to Enjoy Your
Pool Again?
contact.subtitle: Get a free consultation from the Inland Empire's most trusted pool and spa team. Over 40 years of experience, no pressure, just honest recommendations.
